stemHtml: OO-IMC, Lille information, squawk 6120, QNH 1025, ceiling broken 2500 feet. How would those numbers be transmitted by an Air Traffic Services unit?

options.a: OO-IMC, Lille information, squawk sixty-one twenty, QNH one zero two five, ceiling broken two thousand five hundred feet.
options.b: OO-IMC, Lille information, squawk six one two zero, QNH one zero two five, ceiling broken two thousand five hundred feet.
options.c: OO-IMC, Lille information, squawk six one two zero, QNH one zero two five, ceiling broken two five zero zero feet.
options.d: OO-IMC, Lille information, squawk sixty-one twenty, QNH one zero two five, ceiling broken two five zero zero feet.
